news.title: University Admissions - Class of 2026
news.excerpt: Congratulations to 78 KGSA girls who have gained admission to top universities across Kenya. 15 received full scholarship awards.

news.title: New Sports Facility Opening
news.excerpt: KGSA is thrilled to announce the opening of our new multi-purpose sports facility, thanks to generous donations from our supporters.

news.title: Volunteer Opportunities for Q2 2026
news.excerpt: We are recruiting sports coaches, academic tutors, and life skills facilitators for the second quarter. Join our mission to empower girls!

news.title: Alumni Success: Dr. Omondi's Inspiring Journey
news.excerpt: Meet Dr. Mary Omondi, KGSA Class of 2010, now practicing medicine and mentoring our current students.
